title: Slovakian Smoked Pork Bake
description: A hearty Slovakian dish featuring smoky pork and creamy milk topped with a crispy bake. Perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Season the pork shoulder with salt and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, combine milk, light brown sugar, and 1 egg.
Pour the milk mixture over the pork shoulder, making sure it's fully coated.
Transfer the pork to a baking dish and set aside.
In another bowl, combine the bake mix and 1/4 cup of milk to form a crumbly mixture.
Top the pork shoulder with the bake mixture, spreading it evenly.
Bake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes, or until the pork is cooked through and the bake topping is golden brown.
Remove from oven and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
